iran_nuke.notes: Day 18 12:00 — CRITICAL 44. Regime claims readiness for prolonged war. Proliferation risk rising as war extends. 44 + 7 (coupling) = 51.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped). Iran claims control of Hormuz, sets special passage conditions. Araghchi: ready for long war. Dubai airport fuel tank hit by drone. UK joins Hormuz effort. 50th IRGC wave. No ceasefire, no de-escalation.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 101→100. Israel announces ground operations in southern Lebanon. Khiam struck 3x. 4 killed incl 2 children. Iran FM ready for long war. Dubai drone hits airport fuel tank. UK joins Hormuz coalition effort.

turkey.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 86. No new Turkey-specific developments. Sustained NATO intercepts over Turkish airspace from Iran conflict spillover.

india.notes: Day 18 12:00 — ELEVATED 25. India evacuates 550 nationals from ME. Diplomatic balancing. No escalation signals.

russia.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 84 (w/coupling). Finland nuclear hosting debate continues. Iran drones from Russia. Starmer warns of troop deployment question being hardest for PM.

china.notes: Day 18 12:00 — CRITICAL 34 (w/coupling). Trump may delay Xi summit. China stance on Hormuz unclear. US-China friction over ME crisis.

north_korea.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 68. 10 missiles + KN-25 hold. No new provocations. Sustained elevated risk.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped). Russia hammers Ukraine, 6 killed overnight. France SAMP/T NG delivered. 1.28M total Russian losses reported. US talks stalled due to Iran war.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 18 12:00 — IMMINENT 100 (capped). Kandahar strikes continue. 118K displaced. Deadliest phase. 100 (capped).

top_signals: Iran claims control of Strait of Hormuz, sets special conditions for safe passage
Israel announces ground operations in southern Lebanon — 4 killed incl 2 children
Iran FM Araghchi: "Ready for long war" — no ceasefire sought
Dubai airport fuel tank hit by drone, flights suspended then partially resumed
UK Starmer: working with allies on Hormuz plan, says "deploying troops is toughest question"
IRGC 50th wave of attacks on US bases in Gulf continues
Oil prices surge again as Hormuz blockade enters week 3
Pak-Afghan: Kandahar strikes, 118K displaced, deadliest phase
Russia-Ukraine: France SAMP/T NG delivered, 6 killed overnight by Russian drones
Iran: 10K+ Tehran homes destroyed, new security checkpoints against protests

uk_hormuz_coalition activated — UK joins Hormuz coalition effort (+2)
changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: DETERIORATING (Day 18 12:00): Iran claims control of Hormuz. Araghchi ready for long war. Israel ground ops in Lebanon expand. Dubai airport hit. UK mobilizes for Hormuz. ZERO de-escalation channels. Global score 92 STABLE.

latest_news.headline: Iran claims control of Strait of Hormuz, sets special conditions for safe passage
latest_news.text: Iran declares it controls the Strait of Hormuz and sets special conditions for safe passage of ships, escalating the blockade.

latest_news.headline: Israel announces ground operations in southern Lebanon, kills 4 including 2 children
latest_news.text: Israeli military launches ground operations in southern Lebanon. Three strikes on Khiam. 4 killed including 2 children.

latest_news.headline: Iran FM Araghchi: "Ready for long war" — never sought ceasefire
latest_news.text: Iran Foreign Minister says Tehran never sought a ceasefire and is prepared for a prolonged conflict.

latest_news.headline: Dubai airport drone strikes fuel tank, flights suspended then partially resumed
latest_news.text: Iranian drone hits fuel tank near Dubai airport, causing fire. Flights halted overnight, partially resumed.

latest_news.headline: UK PM Starmer working with allies on Hormuz plan, "deploying troops is toughest question"
latest_news.text: Starmer says UK working with allies on viable plan to reopen Strait of Hormuz. Warns cost of living crisis will deepen if war drags on.

outlook: CRITICAL DETERIORATION — Global war probability 86% (Day 18 07:00). NO de-escalation channels active. (1) IRAN CONVENTIONAL IMMINENT 100 capped: Heavy airstrikes continue across Tehran. IRGC 50th wave. Oil crosses $100/barrel. Trump mixed: 'Iran wants ceasefire' but 'terms not acceptable.' Japan/Australia refuse Hormuz. IRGC vows to 'kill Netanyahu.' (2) ISRAEL-LEBANON IMMINENT 96: IDF strikes Beirut. Two-front war. (3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE IMMINENT 100 capped: France sends SAMP/T. 97 drones overnight. US talks stalled. (4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN IMMINENT 100 capped: Kandahar + South Waziristan strikes. 'Deadliest fighting yet.' (5) DPRK IMMINENT 68 RISING: 10 ballistic missiles + KN-25 nuclear test. (6) CHINA CRITICAL 34 RISING: PLA flights resume, Taiwan $40B defense. (7) RUSSIA-NATO CRITICAL 76: Finland nuclear hosting. (8) IRAN NUCLEAR CRITICAL 42 RISING: Prolonged war desperation risk. KEY: Tehran strikes intensifying as Day 18 begins. Oil shock now real at $100+. IRGC escalation rhetoric (kill Netanyahu). WHO black rain environmental warning. Modi calls Pezeshkian — India diplomatic balancing act. Iran strikes ships in Hormuz — shipping insurance spiking, corporate evacuations expanding.
